Drivers and configurations for STM32F2 microcontrollers, including DMA, GPIO, I2C, SPI, UART, and power management.


## Files
- **[clocksource.c](clocksource.c.md)**: Configures and manages the LSE oscillator and MCO1 output for STM32 microcontrollers.
- **[dma.c](dma.c.md)**: DMA driver implementation for STM32F2, including initialization, transfer management, and interrupt handling.
- **[dma_definitions.h](dma_definitions.h.md)**: Defines data structures and enums for DMA controllers, streams, and requests, including an IRQ handler.
- **[exti.c](exti.c.md)**: Implements EXTI configuration and interrupt handling for STM32F2, F4, and F7 microcontrollers.
- **[gpio.c](gpio.c.md)**: GPIO driver implementation for STM32F2, including initialization, configuration, and power management.
- **[gpio_defaults.c](gpio_defaults.c.md)**: Defines a placeholder function for initializing all GPIOs.
- **[i2c_hal.c](i2c_hal.c.md)**: I2C hardware abstraction layer for STM32F2/STM32F4, including initialization, transfer, and IRQ handling.
- **[i2c_hal_definitions.h](i2c_hal_definitions.h.md)**: Definitions and handlers for I2C hardware abstraction layer on STM32F2 microcontrollers.
- **[mcu.c](mcu.c.md)**: Functions for STM32 microcontroller compatibility and utility operations like serial retrieval and cycle conversion.
- **[otp.c](otp.c.md)**: Manages OTP memory slots and locks for STM32 microcontrollers, including read and write operations.
- **[periph_config.c](periph_config.c.md)**: Configuration and control of peripheral clocks for STM32F2, F4, and F7 microcontrollers.
- **[pwm.c](pwm.c.md)**: PWM driver implementation for STM32F2 and STM32F4, including initialization and duty cycle control.
- **[pwr.c](pwr.c.md)**: Power management functions for STM32F2, including wakeup, flash power down, and backup domain access.
- **[rng.c](rng.c.md)**: Generates random numbers using STM32 RNG hardware with error handling and validation.
- **[rtc.c](rtc.c.md)**: Real-time clock (RTC) management for STM32F2, including time setting, calibration, and alarm functionality.
- **[rtc_calibration.c](rtc_calibration.c.md)**: RTC calibration and testing functions for STM32F2 microcontrollers, including frequency adjustment and timer setup.
- **[rtc_calibration.h](rtc_calibration.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for RTC calibration configuration and initialization.
- **[spi.c](spi.c.md)**: Implementation of SPI communication for STM32 microcontrollers, including initialization, data transfer, and DMA support.
- **[spi_definitions.h](spi_definitions.h.md)**: Definitions and structures for configuring and managing SPI buses and slave ports on STM32F2.
- **[spi_legacy.c](spi_legacy.c.md)**: Legacy implementation for calculating SPI prescalers for STM32F2, F4, and F7 microcontrollers.
- **[system_flash.c](system_flash.c.md)**: Functions for erasing, writing, and reading flash memory on STM32F2, F4, and F7 microcontrollers.
- **[timer.c](timer.c.md)**: Adjusts timer frequency and calculates prescaler for STM32F2, F4, and F7 microcontrollers.
- **[uart.c](uart.c.md)**: UART driver implementation for STM32F2/STM32F4, including initialization, configuration, read/write operations, interrupt handling, and DMA support.
- **[uart_definitions.h](uart_definitions.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for UART device state and interrupt handling.
- **[voltage_monitor.c](voltage_monitor.c.md)**: Voltage monitoring implementation for STM32 microcontrollers with ADC reading and mutex handling.
- **[watchdog.c](watchdog.c.md)**: Watchdog driver implementation for STM32F2, F4, and F7 microcontrollers, including initialization and reset flag management.
